Custom Outdoor Carpentry

Crafted for the
outdoors

Handbuilt cedar planters, custom dining tables, hardwood fences, and bespoke outdoor furniture. Designed to weather beautifully and last for generations.

Start Your Project
Scroll

What We Build

Every piece is built by hand,
designed to endure

From backyard garden beds to statement dining tables, each project is custom-built to fit your space and style.

I

Fences

Horizontal ipe and hardwood fences with a modern, clean profile. Built for privacy, designed to look like they belong.

II

Raised Garden Beds

Cedar raised planters in any configuration - single beds, L-shapes, tiered systems - filled and ready to grow. Built to resist rot naturally, no chemicals needed.

III

Outdoor Tables

Teak and hardwood dining tables, farmhouse benches, and bar-height surfaces built for years of outdoor entertaining. Custom sizes to suit your needs.

IV

Custom Pieces

Tile-top bar tables, chess tables, outdoor shower enclosures, storage benches, platforms - if it's wood and it's outside, we build it.

Restoration

Bringing teak back to life

Weathered, grey, and forgotten? We sand, clean, and oil outdoor teak furniture to restore its original warmth and grain.

Years of sun, rain, and neglect turn beautiful teak grey and lifeless. Our restoration process strips away the weathering, opens up the grain, and seals the wood with premium teak oil - bringing back the rich, warm color it had on day one.

Click and drag the slider to see the transformation.

Before After
Before After

After sanding down to fresh wood, we apply multiple coats of teak oil by hand to bring out the natural depth of the grain. The difference between raw sanded wood and a proper oil finish is night and day.

How It Works

From conversation to creation

01

Consultation

We visit your space, discuss your vision, and take measurements. No charge, no commitment.

02

Design

We propose materials, dimensions, and finishes tailored to your property and how you use it.

03

Build

Every piece is handbuilt in our shop and delivered to your home. Most projects complete in 1-2 weeks.

04

Install

We set everything in place, level it, and make sure it's exactly right. Then it's yours.
